name: Aman Kumar Yadav
skills: Machine Learning & Data Analysis: NumPy, Pandas, Matplot, Seaborn, Scikit-learn, Machine Learning models, Deep learning Fundamentals
Web & Development Tools: Streamlit, Git, GitHub
Core Concepts: Data Structures & Algorithms, OOP, Problem Solving

education.institution: Dr. A.P.J. Abdul Kalam Technical University (AKTU)

projects.title: AI-voice-face-attendence
projects.description: Developed an attendance management system using face recognition and voice verification. Built an interactive web interface using Streamlit. Integrated Supabase for storing student records and attendance data.

projects.title: House Price Prediction
projects.description: Built a machine learning model to predict house prices using historical housing data. Performed data preprocessing, feature selection, and model evaluation. Applied regression algorithms using Scikit-learn.

projects.title: Water Fault Management System
projects.description: Built a smart water fault management platform for reporting and monitoring water supply issues. Developed modules for fault registration, status tracking, and data analysis. Improved issue management through centralized data storage and automated workflows. Created dashboards for monitoring fault reports and system performance.

projects.title: Chess Game
projects.description: Developed a fully functional Chess game implementing standard chess rules and piece movements. Designed game logic for move validation, check detection, and game state management. Applied Object-Oriented Programming principles to model chess pieces and board interactions. Created an interactive user interface for gameplay and move tracking.
